description: Initial baseline on autoresearch/2026-04-05-initial
Allowed det(U)<0 in square 2x2 factorisations; no target gain and slightly slower baseline
Deduplicated canonical successors within each frontier-node expansion in BFS
Continue exploring when one bidirectional frontier empties; no target gain and slower overall runtime
Combined deeper frontier exploration with det(U)<0 square factorisations; still no Brix-Ruiz hit and slower
Revalidated canonical-successor dedup on a fresh harness run; same score with lower total runtime
Deduplicated canonical successors across each full frontier layer; same score with much lower duplicate work on Brix-Ruiz telemetry
Added bounded 3x3 same-size moves via cached identity splits; huge factorisation blow-up with no new Brix-Ruiz nodes
Deduplicated factorisation outputs by VU inside the dispatcher; fewer factors but slower overall due extra multiplication cost
Specialized 2x2 and 3x3 permutation canonicalization in the search hot loop; same score with faster warm harness runtime
Optimized small-matrix multiplication to use row slices and zero-skips; same score with a slightly faster warm harness run
Added restricted 3x3 same-size shear factorisations; much deeper Brix frontier growth but no new target hit and slower warm harness runtime
Combined 3x3 shear moves with explicit forward/backward depth budgeting; explored farther but still missed Brix and regressed total runtime
Removed heap allocation from specialized 2x2 and 3x3 canonicalization paths; same score with the fastest warm harness run so far
Added explicit tiny-shape multiplication specializations; stayed correct but regressed the best warm harness runtime
Parallelized the expensive 2x3 rectangular factorisation enumerator on native builds; same score with a much faster warm harness runtime
Parallelized the 3x3-to-2 rectangular factorisation enumerator on native builds; same score with another reduction in warm harness runtime
Parallelized the square 2x2 factorisation enumerator too; stayed correct but regressed the new warm-runtime baseline
Skipped outer rayon frontier scheduling for single-node layers; neutral on correctness but slower than the current best runtime
Streamed factorisation visitation directly into BFS expansion to avoid building merged factorisation vectors before successor filtering
Added bounded balanced-elementary witness search as a sidecar experiment; rules out direct 2x2 balanced witnesses for Brix-Ruiz k=3 and k=4 within the natural common-dimension bound
